title: Cold Hard Gold

inputs.title: Cold Hard Gold
inputs.theme: the come-up from nothing, proving my worth the hard way, loyalty over flash, scars as receipts
inputs.references: 90s boom-bap, soul-sample grit, modern lyricism — feel only, never copied

brief: Make a full song aggressive boom-bap hip-hop song titled "Cold Hard Gold". Center it on: come, from, nothing, proving, worth, hard, way, loyalty. Keep it grounded and specific — not corny. Tempo 88-96 BPM. References (feel, never copied): 90s boom-bap, soul-sample grit, modern lyricism — feel only, never copied.
conceptSummary: Aggressive Boom-Bap Hip-Hop record for my brother: the come-up from nothing, proving my worth the hard way, loyalty over flash, scars as receipts — delivered hard, defiant, triumphant, voiced as gritty.

hookOptions.text: Proving, that's the only thing I kept
For brother, I keep moving through the come
Every step a promise that I build
I been cold but I never let it show
This one's for the worth that raised me

chosenHook.text: Every step a promise that I build

sections.label: Intro
lines: Brother, this one's for you

sections.label: Hook
lines: Every step a promise that I build
Every step a promise that I build
All this proving, I earned it slow
Every step a promise that I build

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Carry the name like it weighs a ton
No shortcuts, just the hard and the long road
I count the worth like I count the days gone by
Wrote it down so brother would always know

sections.label: Hook
lines: Every step a promise that I build
Every step a promise that I build
All this proving, I earned it slow
Every step a promise that I build

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Made a way where the map said there was none
I keep the receipts of everything I lost
Turned the quiet mornings into something I could hold
They ask me how I survive and I just point to the sky

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The distant streets taught me patience and the cost
Brother on my mind every time the beat drop

sections.label: Hook
lines: Every step a promise that I build

finalLyrics:
[Intro]
Brother, this one's for you

[Hook]
Every step a promise that I build
Every step a promise that I build
All this proving, I earned it slow
Every step a promise that I build

[Verse 1]
Carry the name like it weighs a ton
No shortcuts, just the hard and the long road
I count the worth like I count the days gone by
Wrote it down so brother would always know

[Hook]
Every step a promise that I build
Every step a promise that I build
All this proving, I earned it slow
Every step a promise that I build

[Verse 2]
Made a way where the map said there was none
I keep the receipts of everything I lost
Turned the quiet mornings into something I could hold
They ask me how I survive and I just point to the sky

[Bridge]
The distant streets taught me patience and the cost
Brother on my mind every time the beat drop

[Hook]
Every step a promise that I build

All this proving, I earned it slow

arrangement: Intro: sparse, just the lead motif + vinyl
Hook: full drums in, 808 glide, double the vocal
Verse: pull the pad, let the knock breathe
Bridge: drop drums, swell, then re-enter on the one
Outro: filter the beat down, leave the hook ringing
production.genreBlend: aggressive boom-bap hip-hop core with melodic/emotional top line
production.mixVibe: wide, warm low end, vocal up front, slight tape saturation

vocals.delivery: hard, defiant, triumphant delivery, conversational on verses, lifted on the hook
vocals.doublesAndStacks: Double the hook, stack harmonies on the last line of each chorus.

visuals.albumCoverPrompt: Album cover, square 1:1. Cinematic, hard, defiant, triumphant mood. Subject reflects: Aggressive Boom-Bap Hip-Hop record for my brother: the come-up from nothing, proving my worth the hard way, loyalty over flash, scars as receipts — delivered hard, defiant, triumphant, voiced as gritty.. Visual motifs: come, from, nothing, proving. Color: deep shadows, one warm accent light. Film grain, 35mm. No text, no logos, no real-artist likeness. Original styling.
visuals.musicVideoPrompt: Cinematic 16:9 music video. Concept: Aggressive Boom-Bap Hip-Hop record for my brother: the come-up from nothing, proving my worth the hard way, loyalty over flash, scars as receipts — delivered hard, defiant, triumphant, voiced as gritty.. hard, defiant, triumphant tone, aggressive boom-bap hip-hop energy. Grounded, not corny; real locations, natural light with one stylized accent. Original — no copyrighted footage or artist mimicry.
sceneIdeas: Opening: slow 16:9 push-in on the subject, hard, defiant, triumphant light, city at dawn.
Hook: handheld, performance energy, golden hour.
Bridge: single locked-off wide, subject still while the world moves.
Outro: pull back to reveal the place it all started.
shortFormClipIdeas: Behind-the-scenes studio reaction to the drop
Single-take walk synced to the bridge
